hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx) npx biome format --write "$f" ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
npm run check >/dev/null 2>&1 || echo '{"systemMessage":"⚠ npm run check failed: type or lint errors remain."}'
